title: Attendance goes Digital at Üsküdar!
content:
Attendance goes Digital at Üsküdar!

At Üsküdar University, class attendance is now faster and easier than ever with the innovative

.

All you need to do is download the Üsküdar University mobile app on your phone and scan the QR code displayed on the screen before the class begins.

Easy and reliable… Because “Üsküdar is the pioneer of change!”

Fast, practical, and reliable…

As part of Üsküdar University’s ongoing efforts to ensure quality and efficiency in education and to accelerate digital transformation especially since the pandemic, the “QR Code Attendance” system has been developed to allow student attendance to be tracked quickly, easily, and reliably.

This system:

Digitally records students' attendance statuses,

Facilitates systematic management of academic data

The application is used

only for attendance purposes

in compliance with the Law on the Protection of Personal Data (KVKK).

Log in to the Üsküdar App. [You can download the app

here

.]

Select

“Profile”

in the app.

In the Profile menu, tap

“Switch to STIX”

.

Tap the

“Class Attendance”

tab.

Scan the QR code displayed on the screen.

Click

here

to see how the app works.

At Üsküdar University, class attendance is now faster and easier than ever with the innovative

.

All you need to do is download

the Üsküdar University App

on your phone and scan

the QR code

displayed on the screen before the class starts.

It is both easy and secure

Üsküdar leads the change!

HOW TO USE THE QR ATTENDANCE SYSTEM?

Log in to the

Üsküdar App

. [Download the app

here

.]

Select

"Profile"

in the app.

In the profile menu, tap

"Switch to STIX"

.

Click on the

"Class Attendance"

tab.

Scan the QR code displayed on the screen.

Click

here

to see how to use the app!
